response.justification: Roughly 15 years of fullstack experience with a strong TypeScript/Node.js/React core, direct AI-agent and MCP tooling work matching the role's agent-development requirement, and deep testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses). Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, MongoDB/MySQL, and Java exposure round out the requirements; the main gaps are the absence of Nest.js and Vitest specifically, though closely adjacent experience suggests a fast ramp.
strengths: Long, directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack track record
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing expertise, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Significant portion of career in niche DLang ecosystems less relevant to this stack
Kotlin and Python proficiency not demonstrated despite being listed in required skills
